title: Referendum costituzionale Italia 2016 (Renzi)
notes: Pro = SI (approve constitutional reform). Official result: SI 40.89% NO 59.11%. Turnout 65.5%.

title: Elezioni presidenziali Francia 2017 secondo turno (Macron vs Le Pen)
notes: Pro = Macron. Official result: Macron 66.10% Le Pen 33.90%. Turnout 74.6%.

title: Referendum indipendenza Catalunya 2017
notes: Pro = SI (independence). 92% YES but only 43.03% turnout; referendum declared unconstitutional by Spanish courts. Contested legitimacy.

title: Elezioni midterm USA 2018 (House popular vote)
notes: Pro = Democratic Party House vote share. Democrats won ~53.4% of national House popular vote vs ~44.8% Republican.

title: Elezioni europee 2019 Italia (Lega)
notes: Pro = Lega. Official result: Lega 34.33%. Highest single-party result in 2019 European elections in Italy.

title: Elezioni presidenziali USA 2020 (popular vote)
notes: Pro = Biden. Official result: Biden 51.31% Trump 46.85%. Popular vote margin ~4.5 points.

title: Referendum aborto Irlanda 2018 (36th Amendment)
notes: Pro = YES (repeal 8th amendment / allow abortion). Official result: YES 66.40% NO 33.60%. Turnout 64.1%.

title: Elezioni presidenziali Brasile 2022 secondo turno (Lula vs Bolsonaro)
notes: Pro = Lula. Official result: Lula 50.90% Bolsonaro 49.10%. Tightest second round since re-democratization.

title: Referendum divorzio Malta 2011
notes: Pro = YES (introduce divorce). Official result: YES 53.2% NO 46.8%. First divorce legislation in Malta.

title: SVB collapse March 2023 (banking sector confidence)
notes: Pro = confidence in banking sector stability. Gallup April 2023 showed only ~38% of Americans were confident in banks (dropped from ~48% pre-crisis). Approximate figure needs primary source verification.

title: FTX crypto crisis November 2022 (crypto market sentiment)
notes: Pro = positive sentiment toward crypto market. Pew Research Dec 2022 showed ~22% of US adults viewed crypto favorably post-FTX collapse (down from ~33%). Approximate figure needs verification.

title: AMC short squeeze 2021 (retail investor sentiment)
notes: Pro = support for retail investor activism / meme stocks. Survey data limited; Morning Consult Jan 2021 showed ~62% of retail investors had positive view of the movement. Approximate.

title: Tesla stock split August 2020 (investor sentiment)
notes: Pro = positive investor sentiment on Tesla. Morning Consult brand tracking showed ~72% favorable among investors around stock split. Approximate figure.

title: Archegos Capital collapse March 2021 (market impact)
notes: Pro = confidence in prime brokerage / risk management. No reliable public poll; estimated ~35% institutional confidence in counterparty risk management post-event. Highly approximate.

title: United Airlines passenger dragging incident 2017
notes: Pro = favorable view of United Airlines. Morning Consult brand tracking showed favorability dropped to ~28% immediately after incident (from ~36%). Approximate figure.

title: Facebook Meta rebrand October 2021 (public sentiment on metaverse)
notes: Pro = positive sentiment toward Meta/metaverse pivot. Morning Consult showed ~26% positive

title: Twitter X acquisition by Elon Musk 2022
notes: Pro = support for Musk acquisition of Twitter. YouGov Oct 2022 showed ~41% of Americans had favorable view of the acquisition. Approximate.

title: Vaccine hesitancy USA 2021 (COVID vaccination acceptance)
notes: Pro = willing to get vaccinated or already vaccinated. KFF COVID-19 Vaccine Monitor July 2021: ~67% vaccinated or willing. 29% wait-and-see or refuse.

title: Monkeypox public concern USA 2022
notes: Pro = concerned about monkeypox / support public health response. KFF Aug 2022 Health Tracking Poll showed ~47% somewhat or very concerned. Approximate figure.

title: Masking mandate debate USA 2021 (support for mask mandates)
notes: Pro = support mask mandates in public places. Pew Research Sep 2021: ~63% of US adults favored requiring masks in businesses. Down from ~76% in June.
